channel.title: Financial Market on Roshan Rai
channel.description: Recent content in Financial Market on Roshan Rai
channel.author: Roshan Rai

item.title: Disclosure in Financial Market: Costs and Benefits
item.author: Roshan Rai
item.description: Economists George Akerlof (1970), Eugene Fama (1970), Michael Jensen and William Meckling (1976) have argued that information symmetry is key foundation to fair and efficient market. The modern financial market has adopted this notion of information symmetry.

item.title: Financial literacy: Beyond Investor Protection
item.author: Roshan Rai
item.description: Rapid financial innovations can be a problem unless the investors are well aware about the financial instruments. When the majority of public are financially illiterate, it can result in the unnecessary speculations prices of assets. This can create the volatile economy.
